name: MindReply - Lead Scoring & Qualification Pipeline
description: Automated lead scoring with ML - qualifies prospects, assigns scores, routes to sales

parameters.jsCode: const lead = $json; const score = (lead.budget >= 5000 ? 10 : 0) + (lead.timeline === 'urgent' ? 15 : 0) + (lead.company_size > 100 ? 10 : 0) + (lead.industry === 'tech' ? 10 : 0); const qualified = score >= 30; return { ...lead, score, qualified, qualification_level: score > 50 ? 'hot' : score > 30 ? 'warm' : 'cold' };

parameters.query: INSERT INTO leads (email, company, score, qualified, qualification_level, created_at) VALUES ('={{$json.email}}', '={{$json.company}}', {{$json.score}}, {{$json.qualified}}, '={{$json.qualification_level}}', NOW())
